items.title: Apply to Cambridge Homeownership Resale Pool
items.display_date: Applications accepted on a rolling basis
items.description: Cambridge accepts rolling applications for affordable homeownership units offered through the Homeownership Resale Pool.

items.description: Cambridge is accepting new preliminary applications for affordable inclusionary rental housing through the Rental Applicant Pool.

items.description: Cambridge is accepting applications for its Middle-Income Rental Program waiting pool for affordable apartments.

items.title: Return Your Cambridge Annual City Census
items.description: Cambridge residents should return the 2026 annual city census to protect voting rights and support municipal services.
